Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class LegalNaturalPersonCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.LegalNaturalPersonCreate
public class LegalNaturalPersonCreate extends Object
LegalNaturalPersonCreate - A legal natural person. This represents the full set of data for an individual. A Customer Identification Program (CIP) may be run on legal natural persons.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description

    static final LegalNaturalPersonCreate.Builder
    builder()
     
    List<String>
    citizenshipCountries()
    This is used for tax (treaty) and country block list considerations Maximum list of two 2-char CLDR Code citizenship countries, e.g.
    Optional<String>
    controlPersonCompanySymbols()
    A list of ticker symbols in which the underlying person is a control person; control persons are defined as having significant influence over a company’s management and operations, typically through ownership of a large percentage of the company’s voting stock or through positions on the company’s board of directors or executive team
    Optional<Boolean>
    correspondentEmployee()
    Indicates the related owner record is an employee of the clearing broker's correspondent customer.
    String
    correspondentId()
    A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent; A Client may have several operating Correspondents within its purview.
    Optional<DateCreate>
    deathDate()
    Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday.
    Optional<List<String>>
    doingBusinessAs()
    DBA (Doing Business As) names.
    EmploymentCreate
    employment()
    Object containing information pertaining to a investor's current employer including the name, address, and duration of employment.

    Family name of a natural person.

    finraAssociatedEntity()
    The name of the FINRA-associated entity the underlying natural person is affiliated with.

    Foreign identification
    String
    givenName()
    The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.

    Indicates whether the person is an institutional customer
    Optional<LargeTraderCreate>
    largeTrader()
    A large trader.
    Optional<MaritalStatus>
    maritalStatus()
    The legal marital status of an account-holder; Used in combination with state of domicile to determine qualification for account types and beneficiary exclusion rules.
    Optional<String>
    middleNames()
    Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.
    Optional<NameSuffix>
    nameSuffix()
    The suffix of a natural person; A suffix in a name is any part of the name that comes after the last name
    Optional<NaturalPersonFddCreate>
    naturalPersonFdd()
    Foreign Due Diligence for Legal Natural Persons required when a Legal Natural Person is the Primary Owner on a non-resident/non-citizen Account.
    Optional<NonCitizenResidencyCreate>
    nonCitizenResidency()
    Non Citizenship Residency to facilitate non-Citizen lawful US residents to open domestic accounts.

    personalAddress()
    Represents a postal address, e.g.

    politicallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames()
    A Party's self-disclosed list of names representing family members who are politically exposed.

    politicallyExposedOrganization()
    A Party's self-disclosed list of named politically exposed organizations they are personally associated with.

    Boolean indicator whether the LNP is subject to backup withholding

    The nature of the U.S.

  • Method Details

    • accreditedInvestor

      public Optional<Boolean> accreditedInvestor()
      Indicates whether the person is an accredited investor

    • adviser

      public Optional<Boolean> adviser()
      Indicates whether the person is an adviser

    • birthDate

      public DateCreate birthDate()
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

    • citizenshipCountries

      public List<String> citizenshipCountries()
      This is used for tax (treaty) and country block list considerations Maximum list of two 2-char CLDR Code citizenship countries, e.g. US, CA

    • controlPersonCompanySymbols

      public Optional<String> controlPersonCompanySymbols()
      A list of ticker symbols in which the underlying person is a control person; control persons are defined as having significant influence over a company’s management and operations, typically through ownership of a large percentage of the company’s voting stock or through positions on the company’s board of directors or executive team

    • correspondentEmployee

      public Optional<Boolean> correspondentEmployee()
      Indicates the related owner record is an employee of the clearing broker's correspondent customer.

    • correspondentId

      public String correspondentId()
      A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent; A Client may have several operating Correspondents within its purview.

    • deathDate

      public Optional<DateCreate> deathDate()
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

    • doingBusinessAs

      public Optional<List<String>> doingBusinessAs()
      DBA (Doing Business As) names. Can list up to 5 associated with the Legal Natural Person

    • employment

      public EmploymentCreate employment()
      Object containing information pertaining to a investor's current employer including the name, address, and duration of employment.

      Family name of a natural person.

      The name of the FINRA-associated entity the underlying natural person is affiliated with.

      Foreign identification

      public String givenName()
      The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.

    • identityVerificationResult

      public Optional<IdentityVerificationResultCreate> identityVerificationResult()
      An identity verification result that clients may supply. This result represents data and confirmation attesting to identity verification.

      public Optional<Boolean> institutionalCustomer()
      Indicates whether the person is an institutional customer

      A large trader.

    • maritalStatus

      public Optional<MaritalStatus> maritalStatus()
      The legal marital status of an account-holder; Used in combination with state of domicile to determine qualification for account types and beneficiary exclusion rules.

    • middleNames

      public Optional<String> middleNames()
      Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.

    • nameSuffix

      public Optional<NameSuffix> nameSuffix()
      The suffix of a natural person; A suffix in a name is any part of the name that comes after the last name

    • naturalPersonFdd

      public Optional<NaturalPersonFddCreate> naturalPersonFdd()
      Foreign Due Diligence for Legal Natural Persons required when a Legal Natural Person is the Primary Owner on a non-resident/non-citizen Account.

    • nonCitizenResidency

      public Optional<NonCitizenResidencyCreate> nonCitizenResidency()
      Non Citizenship Residency to facilitate non-Citizen lawful US residents to open domestic accounts.

    • personalAddress

      public PostalAddressCreate personalAddress()
      Represents a postal address, e.g. for postal delivery or payments addresses. Given a postal address, a postal service can deliver items to a premise, P.O. Box or similar. It is not intended to model geographical locations (roads, towns, mountains).

      In typical usage an address would be created via user input or from importing existing data, depending on the type of process.

      Advice on address input / editing: - Use an i18n-ready address widget such as https://github.com/google/libaddressinput) - Users should not be presented with UI elements for input or editing of fields outside countries where that field is used.

      For more guidance on how to use this schema, please see: https://support.google.com/business/answer/6397478

    • politicallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames

      public Optional<List<String>> politicallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames()
      A Party's self-disclosed list of names representing family members who are politically exposed.

    • politicallyExposedOrganization

      public Optional<String> politicallyExposedOrganization()
      A Party's self-disclosed list of named politically exposed organizations they are personally associated with.

    • subjectToBackupWithholding

      public Optional<Boolean> subjectToBackupWithholding()
      Boolean indicator whether the LNP is subject to backup withholding

    • taxId

      public Optional<String> taxId()
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related person; Must be provided with `ITIN` or `SSN` tax ID type

    • taxIdType

      public Optional<TaxIdType> taxIdType()
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.

    • taxProfile

      public TaxProfileCreate taxProfile()
      Tax Profile pertaining to the Legal Entity or Natural Person.

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withBirthDate(DateCreate birthDate)
      Represents a whole or partial calendar date, such as a birthday. The time of day and time zone are either specified elsewhere or are insignificant. The date is relative to the Gregorian Calendar. This can represent one of the following:

      * A full date, with non-zero year, month, and day values * A month and day value, with a zero year, such as an anniversary * A year on its own, with zero month and day values * A year and month value, with a zero day, such as a credit card expiration date

      Related types are [google.type.TimeOfDay][google.type.TimeOfDay] and `google.protobuf.Timestamp`.

      The legal marital status of an account-holder; Used in combination with state of domicile to determine qualification for account types and beneficiary exclusion rules.

    • withMiddleNames

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withMiddleNames(String middleNames)
      Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.

    • withMiddleNames

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withMiddleNames(Optional<String> middleNames)
      Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.

    • withNameSuffix

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withNameSuffix(NameSuffix nameSuffix)
      The suffix of a natural person; A suffix in a name is any part of the name that comes after the last name

    • withNameSuffix

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withNameSuffix(Optional<? extends NameSuffix> nameSuffix)
      The suffix of a natural person; A suffix in a name is any part of the name that comes after the last name

    • withNaturalPersonFdd

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withNaturalPersonFdd(NaturalPersonFddCreate naturalPersonFdd)
      Foreign Due Diligence for Legal Natural Persons required when a Legal Natural Person is the Primary Owner on a non-resident/non-citizen Account.

    • withNaturalPersonFdd

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withNaturalPersonFdd(Optional<? extends NaturalPersonFddCreate> naturalPersonFdd)
      Foreign Due Diligence for Legal Natural Persons required when a Legal Natural Person is the Primary Owner on a non-resident/non-citizen Account.

    • withNonCitizenResidency

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withNonCitizenResidency(NonCitizenResidencyCreate nonCitizenResidency)
      Non Citizenship Residency to facilitate non-Citizen lawful US residents to open domestic accounts.

    • withNonCitizenResidency

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withNonCitizenResidency(Optional<? extends NonCitizenResidencyCreate> nonCitizenResidency)
      Non Citizenship Residency to facilitate non-Citizen lawful US residents to open domestic accounts.

    • withPersonalAddress

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withPersonalAddress(PostalAddressCreate personalAddress)
      Represents a postal address, e.g. for postal delivery or payments addresses. Given a postal address, a postal service can deliver items to a premise, P.O. Box or similar. It is not intended to model geographical locations (roads, towns, mountains).

      In typical usage an address would be created via user input or from importing existing data, depending on the type of process.

      Advice on address input / editing: - Use an i18n-ready address widget such as https://github.com/google/libaddressinput) - Users should not be presented with UI elements for input or editing of fields outside countries where that field is used.

      For more guidance on how to use this schema, please see: https://support.google.com/business/answer/6397478

    • withPoliticallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withPoliticallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames(List<String> politicallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames)
      A Party's self-disclosed list of names representing family members who are politically exposed.

    • withPoliticallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withPoliticallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames(Optional<? extends List<String>> politicallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames)
      A Party's self-disclosed list of names representing family members who are politically exposed.

    • withPoliticallyExposedOrganization

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withPoliticallyExposedOrganization(String politicallyExposedOrganization)
      A Party's self-disclosed list of named politically exposed organizations they are personally associated with.

    • withPoliticallyExposedOrganization

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withPoliticallyExposedOrganization(Optional<String> politicallyExposedOrganization)
      A Party's self-disclosed list of named politically exposed organizations they are personally associated with.

    • withSubjectToBackupWithholding

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withSubjectToBackupWithholding(boolean subjectToBackupWithholding)
      Boolean indicator whether the LNP is subject to backup withholding

    • withSubjectToBackupWithholding

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withSubjectToBackupWithholding(Optional<Boolean> subjectToBackupWithholding)
      Boolean indicator whether the LNP is subject to backup withholding

    • withTaxId

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withTaxId(String taxId)
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related person; Must be provided with `ITIN` or `SSN` tax ID type

    • withTaxId

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withTaxId(Optional<String> taxId)
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related person; Must be provided with `ITIN` or `SSN` tax ID type

    • withTaxIdType

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withTaxIdType(TaxIdType taxIdType)
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.

    • withTaxIdType

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withTaxIdType(Optional<? extends TaxIdType> taxIdType)
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.

    • withTaxProfile

      public LegalNaturalPersonCreate withTaxProfile(TaxProfileCreate taxProfile)
      Tax Profile pertaining to the Legal Entity or Natural Person.
